records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander, the last round of outer wall cleanup is done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander, the last round of outer wall cleanup is done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander, the last round of outer wall cleanup is done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone. While Ha Dam finishes tuning the Heavenly Inlaid Armor, wait here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone. While Ha Dam finishes tuning the Heavenly Inlaid Armor, wait here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone. While Ha Dam finishes tuning the Heavenly Inlaid Armor, wait here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Makdong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Makdong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Makdong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What exactly is this Heavenly Inlaid Armor we've been maintaining?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What exactly is this Heavenly Inlaid Armor we've been maintaining?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What exactly is this Heavenly Inlaid Armor we've been maintaining?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's something Ha Dam made when he first founded the Trivanguard
8v Or more precisely, something he invented in a past life.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's something Ha Dam made when he first founded the Trivanguard
8v Or more precisely, something he invented in a past life.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's something Ha Dam made when he first founded the Trivanguard
8v Or more precisely, something he invented in a past life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think of it as a massive barrier meant to trap the Tiger in the past as it leaps across time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think of it as a massive barrier meant to trap the Tiger in the past as it leaps across time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think of it as a massive barrier meant to trap the Tiger in the past as it leaps across time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the only one who can maintain and repair it is Ha Dam, someone with Tiger Blood, since it was designed with his future incarnations in mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the only one who can maintain and repair it is Ha Dam, someone with Tiger Blood, since it was designed with his future incarnations in mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the only one who can maintain and repair it is Ha Dam, someone with Tiger Blood, since it was designed with his future incarnations in mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmm
8v So to keep the Tiger from invading our world, their best bet is to drag Ha Dam into the Administration, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hmm
8v So to keep the Tiger from invading our world, their best bet is to drag Ha Dam into the Administration, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hmm
8v So to keep the Tiger from invading our world, their best bet is to drag Ha Dam into the Administration, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, the Heavenly Inlaid Armor isn't a perfect solution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, the Heavenly Inlaid Armor isn't a perfect solution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, the Heavenly Inlaid Armor isn't a perfect solution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are threats beyond the Three Beasts, and if one of them hits hard enough, the entire plan could fall apart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are threats beyond the Three Beasts, and if one of them hits hard enough, the entire plan could fall apart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are threats beyond the Three Beasts, and if one of them hits hard enough, the entire plan could fall apart.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
A threat that big
8v? Are we talking end-of-the-world big?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
A threat that big
8v? Are we talking end-of-the-world big?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
A threat that big
8v? Are we talking end-of-the-world big?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* You say stuff like that way too casually.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* You say stuff like that way too casually.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* You say stuff like that way too casually.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that just means we might finally see Commander Myeongdal draw his sword, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that just means we might finally see Commander Myeongdal draw his sword, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that just means we might finally see Commander Myeongdal draw his sword, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He said, <color=#ffd34c>"This old man is saving his strength. For the moment it matters most."</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: He said, <color=#ffd34c>"This old man is saving his strength. For the moment it matters most."</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: He said, <color=#ffd34c>"This old man is saving his strength. For the moment it matters most."</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Myeongdal's blood is no ordinary one. It's not reincarnation, but an immortality curse. It's the blood of Mangryang, one of the Three Beasts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Myeongdal's blood is no ordinary one. It's not reincarnation, but an immortality curse. It's the blood of Mangryang, one of the Three Beasts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Myeongdal's blood is no ordinary one. It's not reincarnation, but an immortality curse. It's the blood of Mangryang, one of the Three Beasts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And not once has he ever passed that power down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And not once has he ever passed that power down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And not once has he ever passed that power down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all these years, did you really never think about starting a family?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all these years, did you really never think about starting a family?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all these years, did you really never think about starting a family?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, you want me to tell you an old story now? You're not kids.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, you want me to tell you an old story now? You're not kids.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, you want me to tell you an old story now? You're not kids.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Compared to you, we basically are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Compared to you, we basically are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Compared to you, we basically are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're one of the Three Blades. So you've got to be, what, at least a few thousand years old?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're one of the Three Blades. So you've got to be, what, at least a few thousand years old?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're one of the Three Blades. So you've got to be, what, at least a few thousand years old?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, really? That means you've been single for thousands of years, Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, really? That means you've been single for thousands of years, Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, really? That means you've been single for thousands of years, Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey now, show some respect to the elder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey now, show some respect to the elder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey now, show some respect to the elder.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vIt's fine. Let them talk.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vIt's fine. Let them talk.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vIt's fine. Let them talk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not wrong. I never felt the urge for children, nor did I ever met anyone who wanted to bear them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not wrong. I never felt the urge for children, nor did I ever met anyone who wanted to bear them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not wrong. I never felt the urge for children, nor did I ever met anyone who wanted to bear them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who says you need kids to date someone? You can still have a girlfriend without having kids.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who says you need kids to date someone? You can still have a girlfriend without having kids.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who says you need kids to date someone? You can still have a girlfriend without having kids.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, for an old-timer like me, marriage is supposed to mean leaving behind a lineage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, for an old-timer like me, marriage is supposed to mean leaving behind a lineage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, for an old-timer like me, marriage is supposed to mean leaving behind a lineage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'd be scared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'd be scared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'd be scared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I made my choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I made my choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I made my choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: About what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: About what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: About what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Family. How many kids would you want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Family. How many kids would you want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Family. How many kids would you want?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Family
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Family
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Family
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wow
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wow
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wow
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that sound?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that sound?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that sound?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky's turning red.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky's turning red.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky's turning red.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we'll activate the Well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we'll activate the Well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we'll activate the Well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then no point hesitating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then no point hesitating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then no point hesitating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vRight.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vRight.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vRight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as acting commander of Trivanguard, I authorize Technician Ha Dam to use all Administration-crafted gear under Trivanguard ownership.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, for an old-timer like me, marriage is supposed to mean leaving behind a lineage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, for an old-timer like me, marriage is supposed to mean leaving behind a lineage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That kind of thinking doesn't just go away, no matter how long it's been.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'd be scared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'd be scared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'd be scared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To have someone you cherish, only to outlive them again and again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My child passing before me is just fate. Not a tragedy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the mountaintop oracle said that any child I have would die young, devoured by the Tiger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I made my choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I made my choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I made my choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it meant living alone forever, I wouldn't leave a child behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To live a life where the mere risk of loss makes choosing impossible. That's a heavy price to pay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then don't ever show me a fortune like that. I'm getting married and having kids, no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you begged, I wouldn't read your fortune, you brat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're listening, right, Seosaeng? What about you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: About what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: About what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: About what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Family. How many kids would you want?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Family. How many kids would you want?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Family. How many kids would you want?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, lucky! You're getting a proposal from the Trivanguard's top beauty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I never said that! I do have some dignity, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Obviously the guy's supposed to propose first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha, don't mess this up, Ha Dam. You won't find a better match anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Family
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Family
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Family
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In a world where survival's a daily struggle, starting and protecting a family isn't exactly easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially not for people like us with Beast Blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Wow
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Wow
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Wow
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Not even
8v a drop of romance in him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam's not wrong, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
For someone in the Trivanguard
8v having a family is like staring at a porcelain vase hanging in the sky. A life where even turning your head freely becomes a lifelong struggle.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't care. Even if that's true
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that sound?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that sound?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that sound?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky's turning red.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky's turning red.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky's turning red.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Commander Myeongdal, this omen
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYour hunch was right, Makdong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam, what's the status of the Heavenly Inlaid Armor?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The signal from Heavenly Gate One has vanished.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The other gates aren't stable either. I'll begin emergency repairs immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThen I'm heading to headquarters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it gets too dangerous, abandon the armor and fall back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we abandon it, how do we stop the Tiger?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then we'll activate the Well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then we'll activate the Well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then we'll activate the Well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you, Yeonhwa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple C.O.s approaching. They're targeting the control tower!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All other divisions are defending the front lines. It's up to us to stop them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then no point hesitating.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then no point hesitating.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then no point hesitating.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Yeonhwa! We'll wipe them all out!

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vRight.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vRight.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vRight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Effective immediately, Trivanguard will neutralize all C.O.s interfering with the Heavenly Inlaid Armor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And as acting commander of Trivanguard, I authorize Technician Ha Dam to use all Administration-crafted gear under Trivanguard ownership.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And as acting commander of Trivanguard, I authorize Technician Ha Dam to use all Administration-crafted gear under Trivanguard ownership.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And as acting commander of Trivanguard, I authorize Technician Ha Dam to use all Administration-crafted gear under Trivanguard ownership.
